# Rahman Nendhiarto — Portfolio

> Data Scientist & Software Developer portfolio. Machine learning research, full-stack web apps, dashboards, and production deployments.

Canonical site: https://nendhi.vercel.app
Structured summary (JSON): https://nendhi.vercel.app/portfolio-summary.json
Sitemap: https://nendhi.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## Main pages

- [Home](https://nendhi.vercel.app/): Bio, experience timeline, featured work, tech stack
- [Projects](https://nendhi.vercel.app/proyek): Project categories overview
- [AI & Machine Learning](https://nendhi.vercel.app/proyek/ai-ml): 28 ML notebooks — PM2.5 SCA-LSTM forecasting (R² 0.9787), NLP, computer vision, signal processing
- [Interactive Dashboards](https://nendhi.vercel.app/proyek/dashboards): Plotly analytics case studies on industrial datasets
- [Software Development](https://nendhi.vercel.app/proyek/software-dev): UdaraCast, SIMAGANG, Exporetrade, Kedokploso Village, e-commerce
- [Certificates](https://nendhi.vercel.app/sertifikat): BNSP Associate Data Scientist, Digital Talent Scholarship, ADEPT English
- [Tech Stack](https://nendhi.vercel.app/tumpukan): Python, TensorFlow, Next.js, React, Laravel, MySQL, Power BI

## Featured projects

- [UdaraCast](https://forecastingpm2-5.vercel.app/): PM2.5 air quality forecasting platform by city and year
- [Global PM2.5 Forecast — SCA-LSTM](https://nendhi.vercel.app/proyek/ai-ml): Research notebook, RMSE 0.1042, R² 0.9787
- [SIMAGANG BBKB](https://simagangporto.vercel.app/): Internship registration portal, Ministry of Industry Indonesia
- [Exporetrade](https://exporetrade.vercel.app/): Buyer-supplier marketplace
- [Istana Sayur Buah](https://istanasayurbuah.com/): Fresh produce e-commerce (Freshly brand)

## Experience

- Undergraduate Researcher, Universitas Ahmad Dahlan (2025–Present): PM2.5 prediction with SCA-LSTM
- Full Stack Developer Intern, BBSPJIKB Yogyakarta (2025): SIMAGANG internship system
- Lead Developer & Project Manager, Istana Sayur Buah (2024–2025): Production e-commerce delivery
